issues.description: OnKO effect uses wrong action type. Official text requires looking at top 3 cards and revealing up to 1 {Big Mom Pirates} type card to add to hand, then placing the rest at bottom of deck. DSL uses generic SearchDeck without specifying the 3-card look, type filter, or bottom-of-deck placement.
Second effect with Trigger trigger does not exist in the official effect text. The card only has an [On K.O.] effect, not a [Trigger] effect.
